title: Pamela Hicks, Lady-in-Waiting to Elizabeth II of Britain, Dies at 97
summary_full: The queen’s third cousin, she was a bridesmaid at the royal wedding in 1947, and witnessed firsthand pivotal moments in British history.
summary_public: The queen’s third cousin, she was a bridesmaid at the royal wedding in 1947, and witnessed firsthand pivotal moments in British history.
